title: phyllanthus obliquus
intro: Phyllanthus obliquus, also known as the green chayote or Mexican nutmeg, is a type of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus obliquus is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be found in some traditional remedies and supplements.
